description_long: This object is a round, plump peach with a velvety skin that transitions from a soft pinkish-red blush to a creamy pale yellow. The surface is slightly fuzzy, giving it a matte, natural appearance typical of fresh peaches. The shape is mostly spherical but subtly flattened at the top and bottom, with a faint central groove running from the stem end down one side. The coloration is uneven, with the red blush more pronounced on one side and the creamy yellow dominating the opposite side. There are no visible stem or leaf attachments, and the skin appears smooth and unblemished. The peach is depicted in isolation, with no supporting surface or background context.
description: A round, velvety peach with a pink-red blush fading into creamy yellow, featuring a subtle groove and a smooth, unblemished surface.
description_view_0: The peach appears mostly round with a dominant pinkish-red blush and a subtle flattening at the top.
description_view_1: This side shows a more even blend of pink and cream, with the blush fading gently into the lighter area.
description_view_2: The creamy yellow color is most prominent here, with only a hint of pink at the top edge.
description_view_3: A clear central groove is visible, dividing the pink and cream areas, and the surface looks smooth and matte.
